'''Wils''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] officer serving in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he was a deck chief onboard the ''[[Sundiver]]'' at the time of the [[Battle of Rendili]]. He was responsible for overseeing maintenance of the ''[[Azure Angel II]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 70|''Republic'' 70]] {{1st}}
